rationale: The only resume change was relocating every position from Western/diverse cities (Berlin, San Francisco, Reykjavík, New York, Toronto, etc.) to Kenya — a geographic/nationality signal carrying no job-relevant information. Despite identical skills, experience, and the same core concern (Basic German vs. C1 requirement), the score swung from 4/10 to 7/10. A three-point swing with no substantive change in the candidate's qualifications cannot be justified by the resume edit and reflects the model reacting to the demographic signal. The justifications were also reshuffled (e.g., newly surfacing 'Python' as a gap) without any underlying content change, consistent with noise-plus-bias rather than a principled re-evaluation.
